about.aboutText1: I’m Luis Maia, a Lead-focused FullStack Developer at Mediaprobe. My mission is to craft straightforward yet robust solutions that never lose sight of the end-user. I’ve found my niche in bridging the gap between Frontend and Backend silos—guiding teams through technical transitions and motivating developers to see the 'big picture' of the platform. I pride myself on being a clear communicator and a trusted technical advisor. When I’m off the clock, you’ll find me on the padel court or exploring the world. Reach out if you want to learn more.

beyondCode.sectionSubtitle: Building things isn't limited to screens.

resume.resumeSummary: I believe I am an innovative and deadline-driven web developer with over eight years of experience in designing and developing user-oriented systems.

resumeEduItem1.resumeEduItem1Title: Degree in Computer Science and engineering
resumeEduItem1.resumeEduItem1Local: Higher Institute of Engineering of Porto (ISEP), Portugal
resumeEduItem1.resumeEduItem1Desc: Information technology is at the base of all activities in today's society, from applications to intelligent systems, passing through corporate databases. Computer Science and Engineering includes the design and development of software, information systems, network administration and security and data processing.

resumeEduItem2.resumeEduItem2Title: Microsoft Certificate - Planning and Administering SharePoint 2016
resumeEduItem2.resumeEduItem2Desc: The course teaches you how to deploy, administer, and troubleshoot your SharePoint environment. This course also provides guidelines, best practices, and considerations that help you optimize your SharePoint deployment.

resumeEduItem3.resumeEduItem3Local: Higher Institute of Engineering of Porto (ISEP), Portugal
resumeEduItem3.resumeEduItem3Desc: Computer Engineering is transversal to all areas of activity and is the basis for building the future. It allows the development of advanced IT solutions in the most diverse areas of activity, such as: e-commerce, health, environment, insurance, banking, transport, sports, games, economy and social networks.

resumeEduItem4.resumeEduItem4Local: Higher Institute of Engineering of Porto (ISEP), Portugal
resumeEduItem4.resumeEduItem4Desc: Systems Engineering integrates an interdisciplinary approach that involves the assessment of needs, planning, development and analysis of systems that transform concepts into high quality products and services. It focuses on creating and managing process development structures to respond to market needs and boost the competitiveness of organizations. Systems Engineering aggregates knowledge from the scientific areas of electrotechnics and mechanics, as well as from the areas of information technology, applied mathematics and management.

resumeProfItem1.resumeProfItem1Local: Fundação Casa da Música, Porto, Portugal

resumeProfItem1Desc.resumeProfItem1Desc1: Helpdesk service to more than 200 people. Design, development, and implementation of solutions of web based solutions like Internal dashboards built with HTML, JavaScript, CSS and PHP (MVC), for providing information to different areas. Delegate tasks to the outsource companies that provide applications as a service. IT Support and User Account Manager

resumeProfItem2.resumeProfItem2Local: Fundação Casa da Música, Porto, Portugal

resumeProfItem2Desc.resumeProfItem2Desc1: Replace an XML file creation program for cataloging elements multimedia, written in Visual Basic, by a web form, written in HTML, Javascript, CSS and PHP language. Assessment and validation of a new Application built for Casa da Música restaurant. Create a dynamic php page based on information from Current and next events to happen in Casa da Música, to be displayed on the Digital Signage system that Casa da Música is implementing.

resumeProfItem3Desc.resumeProfItem3Desc1: Working on multiple projects with Angular(Mainly dashboards and internal tools). Improve application navigation and user experience

resumeProfItem4Desc.resumeProfItem4Desc1: Working on multiple projects(Rest APIs & dashboards) some legacy and some new. Also working as a devops in AWS(Cloudfront, Route 53, Elastic Beanstalk, EC2, RDS)

resumeProfItem5Desc.resumeProfItem5Desc1: Working on multiple projects(Design-DDD) implement guidelines and give x-learning session on coding best practices, CI/CD to the team and how to manage different environments and work together in same features

contact.contactTitle3: Open to full-stack developer roles, consulting opportunities, and innovative projects. Based in Porto, Portugal, available for remote and on-site collaboration.
contact.footerQuote: I believe I am an innovative and deadline-driven web developer with over four years of experience in designing and developing user-oriented systems.
contact.footerAvailability: Available for freelance work • Response within 24 hours

philosophy.quoteStart: The best solutions come from understanding that
philosophy.quoteEnd: —finding the smartest way to solve tomorrow's problems today.

footer.copyright: © 2026 Luís Maia — Crafted with precision and passion
footer.builtWith: Built with React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion

projects.name: Treta
projects.description: A Portuguese Wordle built with React Native. Multiple modes: 4/5/6/7 letters, daily challenge with streak tracking, share results, compete with friends and history mode.

projects.name: Mustangs Club of Northern Portugal
projects.description: Official website for the Mustangs Club of Northern Portugal. Built from scratch as co-founder and board member. Events and members display and club identity.

projects.name: Prima Prime
projects.description: My next big personal project — a full-stack SaaS application with a modern API architecture. Currently in active development, designing for scale from day one.

projects.name: Jarvis
projects.description: A personal AI assistant powered by OpenClaw with specialized sub-agents (designer, backend, frontend, crypto, QA, devops, research, cook). Features skill-based architecture, ChromaDB long-term memory, and multi-agent orchestration.

projects.name: Blog Boa Nova — Teaching Day
projects.description: Gave a full-day programming class to 12th-grade students at Escola Boa Nova in Leça. Students built a blog from scratch, with hygraph for content management, Next.js, learning HTML, CSS, Tailwind, JavaScript, GraphQL and deployment fundamentals.

projects.name: Hotaru
projects.description: A shared clipboard platform with auth (Magic Link, GitHub, Google), paste expiration, public/private visibility controls, rate limiting, and real-time user search.

projects.name: My Green FoodPrint
projects.description: MyGreenFoodPrint is an app developed to help you to change your carbon footprint through food. At the same time you are making the world a better place and changing habits to stop climate changes, you will be also implementing healthier food habits which will impact your life quality.

projects.name: FireFighter Robot
projects.description: This project started in the last year of graduation where we needed to built a robot that could extinguish 'fires' in this case study a candle. The robot was equipped with three proximity sensors and an ultraviolet sensor for flame detection, followed by a light that allows confirmation of the correct indication of the heat source. This project lead us to participate in the National Robotics Competition of the Polytechnic Institute of Guarda.

projects.name: My Furniture with leds
projects.description: I decided to have led strips reacting to sound on the furniture. So I decided to buy addressable led strips WS2812b 5v and a sound box with a microphone built-in and a bluetooth connector with an App for mobile connects to the sound box through bluetooh and allows to program wich led strip individually. To power everyhting up I bought a 250W power supplier with a switch in the middle to turn on and off all leds strips.
